description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.5.0 Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs the locales package, writes "en_US UTF-8" to /etc/locale.gen, generates the locale, and exports LANG, LANGUAGE, and LC_ALL as en_US.UTF-8. Define a single deploy stage with a pages job that executes the script commands: gem install jekyll, gem install jekyll-sitemap, gem install jekyll-paginate, gem install jekyll-feed, and jekyll build -d public/. The job publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the job to run only on the master branch.
